title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS310-8G+2S+IN
description: Take advantage of the blazing fast 2.5/10 Gigabit combo and upgrade your workspace! Even small offices are shifting from Gigabit connections to the lightning-fast realm of 2.5 Gigabit connectivity. With CRS310-8G+2S+IN, we aim to give you the tools to outpace your competition with a strong combination of eight 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet ports and two 10 Gigabit SFP+ ports in a compact, powerful package! Furthermore, these SFP+ cages support multiple data rates: 1G, 2.5G, and 10G. So you can use this… 8X 2.5 GIGABIT ETHERNET PORTS 2X 10G SFP+ PORTS POWERFUL MARVELL 98DX226S SWITCH-CHIP 256 MB RAM USB port RouterOS v7, License level 5 device 24V 1.5A power adapter Rackmount bracket
